events.description: segment opens, title text fades in with subtitle
'persist beyond uninstall' text pulses with red danger glow
extension puzzle-piece icon scales in with blue glow
'WRITING TO SYSTEM' action badge appears below extension
travel dot animates down toward shell profile card
shell profile target card slides up with .bashrc label and payload dot planted
travel dot animates toward git hooks card
git hooks target card slides up with .git/hooks label and payload dot planted
travel dot animates toward startup scripts card
startup scripts target card slides up with autostart label and payload dot planted
extension icon shrinks, grayscales, and fades out — uninstall animation
'Extension Removed' label with trash icon appears where extension was
all 3 payload dots turn red and pulse — danger state activated, warning banner slides in with 'payload stays behind' text
